---
title: "Spotify Plays"
output: 
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    orientation: columns
    vertical_layout: scroll
runtime: shiny
---


```{r global, include=FALSE}
library(flexdashboard);library(tidyverse);
library(httr2);library(jsonlite);library(shiny);library(DT)
print(getwd())
source(here::here("R", "bootstrap.R"))
source_project("R", "lib", "getLastfm.R")
source_project("R", "lib", "getSlugs.R")

lastfm <- getLastfm(F)

## Spotify Auth
# Spotify auth ------------------------------------------------------------
spotID <- Sys.getenv('SPOTIFY_ID')
spotSecret <- Sys.getenv('SPOTIFY_SECRET')
spotAuth <- "https://accounts.spotify.com/authorize"
spotRedirectUri <- Sys.getenv('SPOTIFY_REDIRECT_URI', unset = 'http://127.0.0.1:1410/callback')
spotCacheDir <- here::here("data", "cache", "spotify_oauth")

if (!dir.exists(spotCacheDir)) {
    dir.create(spotCacheDir, recursive = TRUE)
}

if (!nzchar(spotID) || !nzchar(spotSecret)) {
    stop("SPOTIFY_ID / SPOTIFY_SECRET not found in environment.")
}

if (!str_detect(spotRedirectUri, '^https://') && !str_detect(spotRedirectUri, '^http://127\\.0\\.0\\.1') && !str_detect(spotRedirectUri, '^http://localhost')) {
    stop(str_c(
        "SPOTIFY_REDIRECT_URI must be https://, or a loopback URL (http://127.0.0.1... / http://localhost...). ",
        "Current value: ", spotRedirectUri
    ))
}

options(httr2_oauth_cache = spotCacheDir)

spotClient <- httr2::oauth_client(
    id = spotID,
    secret = spotSecret,
    token_url = "https://accounts.spotify.com/api/token",
    name = "last2spot"
)

getSpotAuth <- function (req) {
    req_oauth_auth_code(
        req,
        client = spotClient,
        auth_url = spotAuth, 
        scope = str_c('playlist-read-private',
                      'playlist-read-collaborative',
                      sep = " "),
        cache_disk = TRUE,
        redirect_uri = spotRedirectUri
    )
}

performSpotReq <- function(req) {
    tryCatch(
        req_perform(req),
        error = function(e) {
            err <- conditionMessage(e)
            if (str_detect(err, "requires an interactive session")) {
                stop(str_c(
                    "Spotify auth needs an interactive login the first time. ",
                    "Run the report in an interactive R session once to authorize. ",
                    "Token cache path: ", spotCacheDir, ". ",
                    "Also ensure redirect URI is configured exactly in Spotify app settings: ", spotRedirectUri, "."
                ))
            }
            stop(e)
        }
    )
}
# Get list of playlists ---------------------------------------------------
plReq <- httr2::request(base_url = "https://api.spotify.com/v1/users/tomcopple/playlists") %>% 
    getSpotAuth() %>% 
    performSpotReq()
plResp <- plReq %>% resp_body_json()
howManyPlaylists <- plResp %>% pluck('total')

allPlaylists <- data.frame()
reps <- (howManyPlaylists - 1) %/% 50 + 1

for (i in 1:reps) {
    getPlReq <- httr2::request(base_url = "https://api.spotify.com/v1/users/tomcopple/playlists") %>% 
        getSpotAuth() %>% 
        req_url_query(limit = 50, offset = 50 * (i - 1))
    getPlResp <- getPlReq %>% 
        performSpotReq() %>% 
        resp_body_string() %>% 
        jsonlite::fromJSON()
    getPlaylists <- getPlResp %>% 
        pluck('items') %>% 
        select_if(names(.) %in% c('name', 'id', 'images')) %>% 
        mutate(images = map_chr(images, function(x) {
            if(!is.null(x$url)) {
                # print(names(x))
                x %>% pull(url) %>% first()
            } else {
                ""
            }
        }))
    allPlaylists <- bind_rows(allPlaylists, getPlaylists) %>% 
        arrange(name)
}

```

Column {.sidebar}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Select playlist

```{r}
shiny::radioButtons(inputId = 'choosePlaylist', label = 'Select playlist',
                    choiceValues = unname(as.character(allPlaylists$id)),
                    choiceNames = unname(as.character(allPlaylists$name)),
                    selected = first(unname(as.character(allPlaylists$id))))

actionButton(inputId = 'refreshLastfm', label = 'Refresh Lastfm', icon = icon('refresh'))

rv <- reactiveValues(lastfm = lastfm,
                     allPlaylists = allPlaylists)

observeEvent(input$choosePlaylist, {
    choosePlaylist <- input$choosePlaylist
   rv$imageURL <- filter(allPlaylists,
                     id == choosePlaylist) %>% 
                 pull('images') %>% 
                 unname() %>% 
                 first()
})
observeEvent(eventExpr = input$refreshLastfm,
             handlerExpr = {
                 showNotification('Updating Lastfm...')
                 rv$lastfm <- getLastfm(T)
                 showNotification('Lastfm updated!', type = 'message')
             })
```

Column {data-width=600}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Table of Plays {data-height=800}

```{r}
DT::renderDataTable({
    playlistID <- input$choosePlaylist

## Can only get 100 tracks at a time, so need to know how many times to run it
totalTracksReq <- httr2::request(base_url = str_glue(
    'https://api.spotify.com/v1/playlists/{playlistID}/tracks'
    )) %>% 
    getSpotAuth()
totalTracksResp <- performSpotReq(totalTracksReq) %>% 
    resp_body_json()
totalTracks <- totalTracksResp %>% pluck('total')

offsets <- if (isTRUE(totalTracks > 0)) {
    seq.int(from = 0, to = floor((totalTracks - 1)/100))
} else {
    integer(0)
}

## Define function to get tracks
## x is offset, i.e. starts at 1 and goes up (defined by i)
getTracks <- function(x) {
    tracksReq <- httr2::request(
        base_url = str_glue('https://api.spotify.com/v1/playlists/{playlistID}/tracks'
                            )) %>% 
        getSpotAuth() %>% 
        req_url_query(
            fields = "items(track(artists.name,album(name),track_number,name))",
            limit = 100, 
            offset = x*100)
    tracksResp <- tracksReq %>% 
        performSpotReq() %>% 
        resp_body_json(simplifyVector = FALSE)

    items <- pluck(tracksResp, 'items', .default = list())
    tracksRaw <- purrr::map(items, ~ pluck(.x, 'track', .default = NULL)) %>% 
        purrr::discard(is.null)

    if (length(tracksRaw) == 0) {
        return(tibble::tibble(
            artist = character(),
            track = character(),
            album = character()
        ))
    }

    tracks <- tibble::tibble(
        artist = purrr::map_chr(tracksRaw, ~ {
            artistName <- pluck(.x, 'artists', 1, 'name', .default = NA_character_)
            if (is.null(artistName) || !nzchar(artistName)) NA_character_ else as.character(artistName)
        }),
        track = purrr::map_chr(tracksRaw, ~ {
            trackName <- pluck(.x, 'name', .default = NA_character_)
            if (is.null(trackName) || !nzchar(trackName)) NA_character_ else as.character(trackName)
        }),
        album = purrr::map_chr(tracksRaw, ~ {
            albumName <- pluck(.x, 'album', 'name', .default = NA_character_)
            if (is.null(albumName) || !nzchar(albumName)) NA_character_ else as.character(albumName)
        })
    ) %>% 
        filter(!is.na(track), !is.na(artist))

    return(tracks)
}

tracks <- if (length(offsets) == 0) {
    tibble::tibble(
        artist = character(),
        track = character(),
        album = character()
    )
} else {
    map_df(offsets, getTracks)
}

lastfm <- rv$lastfm

## Merge together
trackCount <- tracks %>% 
    mutate(track_join = getSlugs(track),
           artist_join = getSlugs(artist)) %>% 
    left_join(lastfm %>% 
                  transmute(track_join = getSlugs(track),
                            artist_join = getSlugs(artist)) %>% 
                  count(artist_join, track_join),
              by = c('artist_join', 'track_join')) %>% 
    select(!contains('_join')) %>% 
  mutate(n = replace_na(n, 0)) %>% 
    select(artist, track, album, n)

DT::datatable(trackCount,
              height = "85vh",
              fillContainer = TRUE,
              options = list(
    pageLength = 50,
    scrollY = "75vh",
    scrollCollapse = FALSE
))
})

```

Column {data-width=200}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### 

```{r picture, echo = F, fig.cap = "Title", out.width = '100%'}
# image <- rv$allPlaylists %>% 
#     filter(id == input$choose)
# shiny::renderImage({
#     print(rv$imageURL)
# list(src = rv$imageURL,
#          contentType = 'image/png',
#          width = 300,
#          height = 300,
#          alt = "This is alternate text")})
# knitr::include_graphics('tempData/image.png')
shiny::renderUI({
    tags$img(src = rv$imageURL,
             width = "250px", height = "250px"
               )
})
```
